sql_array: CREATE TABLE ssl_test (id UInt32, cert_info String DEFAULT NULL, status String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, cert_info, status FROM ssl_test WHERE status NOT LIKE showCertificate() AND cert_info IS NULL;
SELECT id, status FROM ssl_test WHERE status NOT LIKE (SELECT showCertificate() FROM ssl_test WHERE id = 1) AND id = (SELECT id FROM ssl_test WHERE status = 'valid');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id FROM ssl_test WHERE status NOT LIKE showCertificate() AND (cert_info IS NOT NULL OR cert_info != ''));
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY status) AS status_count FROM ssl_test GROUP BY id, status HAVING status NOT LIKE showCertificate();
SELECT id FROM ssl_test WHERE cert_info NOT LIKE showCertificate() AND (status IS NULL OR status = 'invalid') ORDER BY id DESC;
